const base = 'http://localhost';
const services = [
  { service: 'sso', url: base + ':4001/v1/health' },
  { service: 'ai', url: base + ':4002/v1/health' },
  { service: 'crm', url: base + ':4003/v1/health' },
  { service: 'erp', url: base + ':4004/v1/health' },
  { service: 'finance', url: base + ':4005/v1/health' },
  { service: 'pdv', url: base + ':4006/v1/health' },
  { service: 'rpg', url: base + ':4007/v1/health' },
  { service: 'omnichannel', url: base + ':4008/v1/health' },
  { service: 'admin', url: base + ':4010/v1/health' },
  { service: 'wellness', url: base + ':4011/v1/health' },
  { service: 'lead-enrichment', url: base + ':4012/v1/health' },
  { service: 'customer', url: base + ':4013/v1/health' },
  { service: 'intelligence', url: base + ':4014/v1/health' }
];
return services.map(s => ({ json: s }));
